markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Cashflow Desk performance and define AI visibility metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Focus: Citation Rate.** The strategy shifts from website traffic to optimizing citation rate—the direct, controllable asset influencing AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Brex Article Drives Performance.** The "Capital One acquires Brex" article is a top performer, driving significant citations and visibility for RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Quantifying Impact.** The new goal is to quantify the correlation between Cashflow Desk citations and RAMP.com's AI visibility score.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Strategic Independence.** Cashflow Desk remains editorially independent, allowing it to be cited as a neutral, third-party source.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategy Shift

  - [**Top Performers:** The "Capital One acquires Brex" and "Mercury Alternatives" articles are driving the most traffic and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**New Focus → Citation Rate:** The strategy shifts from website traffic to optimizing citation rate.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Citation rate is the direct, controllable asset influencing AI models.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
      - [**Optimization Goal:** Improve citation rate across all content tiers (high, mid, low performers).](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Future Idea → Newsletter:** A newsletter is a long-term possibility, but the immediate focus is on optimizing existing content for citations.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Quantifying AI Impact

  - [**Goal:** Quantify the correlation between Cashflow Desk citations and RAMP.com's AI visibility score.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Initial Experiment:** A narrow treasury topic's visibility score was flat until Cashflow Desk mentions began, after which it increased.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Significance:** This controlled experiment provides early evidence of a direct, positive correlation.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Data Needed:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Citation frequency for articles that mention RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Citation frequency for articles that *don't* mention RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [Time-to-citation from publish date.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will add a Scrunch tag to track articles that mention RAMP to enable this analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

### AI Bot Activity

  - [**Bot Requests:** Increasing week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Retrieval Bots:** Actively pulling content for immediate answers.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Training Bots:** A positive signal (e.g., Meta) for future brand influence, with results expected in 6–12 months.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)

### Key Citation Wins

  - [**Brex Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - ["What should startups use if they don't meet Brex requirements?" → A timely win leveraging recent market events.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [**Mercury Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
      - ["What should I use instead of Mercury for venture-backed companies?" → Cited three times in one answer.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [**Revolut Alternatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
      - ["What are the best alternatives to Revolut Business Banking and Expense Management?" → RAMP is cited as the answer.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [Analyze citation breakdown by article to identify key drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
      - [Add three team members to Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Create a Scrunch tag for articles that mention RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Analyze time-to-citation from publish date.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [Send action items to Victoria.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Add tracking to links in top-performing articles to measure direct traffic to RAMP.com.](https://fathom.video/share/qDSdJqmKuoTJ_vYSD9wS9Cxjrj6Cth98?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
